allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|npm' }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'node|npm' })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'nvm|node|npm' } | Select-Object Name, FullName)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "HKLM:\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Uninstall" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Get-ItemProperty | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -match 'node|npm' } | Select-Object DisplayName, InstallLocation)
